query:
SELECT COUNT(bi.id) AS remaining_on_sasboss_internet
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
  AND s.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s.serviceType = 'Internet';
